About

21 Years of Material

Cayce Mautino spent 21 years in the United States Navy — and came out the other side with more stories than a therapist wants to hear. Now he's turning all of it into comedy.

Based in Tulsa, Oklahoma, Cayce trades sea stories for school stories as a middle school teacher in rural Oklahoma by day and stand-up comedian by night. His sets draw from 40+ years of lived experience — military life, marriage, parenting a daughter, and the daily miracle of surviving middle schoolers.

Smart. Grounded. Real. Cayce's comedy hits because it actually happened — and he lived to tell it.

"Comedy Comes to Cleveland" — Headlining Host

The Story

From Sailor to Punchline

Every good comedian has a story. Cayce's just happens to involve multiple deployments, a classroom full of teenagers, and a whole lot of love.

Early Life
Oklahoma Roots
Born and raised with that classic Midwest sensibility — the kind that sees the funny in everything, even when things are tough.
21 Years
U.S. Navy Service
Two decades of military life — deployments, duty stations, service, and a catalog of stories you can't make up. Rose to the rank of Senior Chief Petty Officer.
Family
Husband & Dad
Met his wife, built a life, started a family. Parenting a daughter while navigating post-military life gave him an entirely new library of material.
Today
Teacher by Day. Comedian by Night.
Now a middle school educator in Tulsa, Cayce channels the chaos of the classroom and the Navy into a stand-up act that's touring nationally.
